assumptions.recency_metric: assumed proxy 100 due no packet recency data

evidence_confirmed: embedded packet records, threshold, budget, and option list used directly
all scoring/calculation elements are formula-driven in workbook
evidence_unresolved: no direct recency field provided in packet
no explicit O2/O3 placement inside provided 3-metric formula

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
